name: shoelace
description: A forward-thinking library of Web Components. 50+ components for building modern UIs.
compatibilityJustification: Shoelace uses Lit internally but does not publish LessJS SSR metadata. All components are client-only.

@supports (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock {
    scrollbar-gutter: var(--sl-scroll-lock-gutter) !important;
  }

  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert::part(base) {
  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);
}
</style><sl-alert open variant="primary">This is an alert message with important information.<style>sl-alert { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-alert *, sl-alert ::before, sl-alert ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-alert { display: contents; margin: 0px; }
.alert { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: stretch; background-color: var(--sl-panel-background-color); border-top-color: ; border-top-style: ; border-right-color: ; border-right-style: ; border-right-width: ; border-bottom-color: ; border-bottom-style: ; border-bottom-width: ; border-left-color: ; border-left-style: ; border-left-width: ; border-image-source: ; border-image-slice: ; border-image-width: ; border-image-outset: ; border-image-repeat: ; border-top-width: calc(var(--sl-panel-border-width) * 3); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium); font-family: var(--sl-font-sans); font-size: var(--sl-font-size-small); font-weight: var(--sl-font-weight-normal); line-height: 1.6; color: var(--sl-color-neutral-700); margin: inherit; overflow: hidden; }
.alert:not(.alert--has-icon) .alert__icon, .alert:not(.alert--closable) .alert__close-button { display: none; }
.alert__icon { flex: 0 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: var(--sl-font-size-large); padding-inline-start: var(--sl-spacing-large); }
.alert--has-countdown { border-bottom-width: medium; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-color: currentcolor; }
.alert--primary { border-top-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); }
.alert--primary .alert__icon { color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); }
.alert--success { border-top-color: var(--sl-color-success-600); }
.alert--success .alert__icon { color: var(--sl-color-success-600); }
.alert--neutral { border-top-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-600); }
.alert--neutral .alert__icon { color: var(--sl-color-neutral-600); }
.alert--warning { border-top-color: var(--sl-color-warning-600); }
.alert--warning .alert__icon { color: var(--sl-color-warning-600); }
.alert--danger { border-top-color: var(--sl-color-danger-600); }
.alert--danger .alert__icon { color: var(--sl-color-danger-600); }
.alert__message { flex: 1 1 auto; display: block; padding: var(--sl-spacing-large); overflow: hidden; }
.alert__close-button { flex: 0 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: var(--sl-font-size-medium); margin-inline-end: var(--sl-spacing-medium); align-self: center; }
.alert__countdown { position: absolute; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: calc(var(--sl-panel-border-width) * 3); background-color: var(--sl-panel-border-color); display: flex; }
.alert__countdown--ltr { justify-content: flex-end; }
.alert__countdown .alert__countdown-elapsed { height: 100%; width: 0px; }
.alert--primary .alert__countdown-elapsed { background-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); }
.alert--success .alert__countdown-elapsed { background-color: var(--sl-color-success-600); }
.alert--neutral .alert__countdown-elapsed { background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-600); }
.alert--warning .alert__countdown-elapsed { background-color: var(--sl-color-warning-600); }
.alert--danger .alert__countdown-elapsed { background-color: var(--sl-color-danger-600); }
.alert__timer { display: none; }</style>
<!---->
      <div part="base" role="alert" class=" alert alert--open alert--primary " aria-hidden="false">
        <div part="icon" class="alert__icon">
          <slot name="icon"></slot>
        </div>

        <div part="message" class="alert__message" aria-live="polite">
          <slot>This is an alert message with important information.</slot>
        </div>

        <!--?lit$528469644$-->

        <div role="timer" class="alert__timer"><!--?lit$528469644$-->Infinity</div>

        <!--?lit$528469644$-->
      </div>
    </sl-alert></div>

attributes.name: open
attributes.description:
Indicates whether or not the alert is open. You can toggle this attribute to show and hide the alert, or you can
use the `show()` and `hide()` methods and this attribute will reflect the alert's open state.

attributes.name: closable
attributes.description: Enables a close button that allows the user to dismiss the alert.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The alert's theme variant.

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description:
The length of time, in milliseconds, the alert will show before closing itself. If the user interacts with
the alert before it closes (e.g. moves the mouse over it), the timer will restart. Defaults to `Infinity`, meaning
the alert will not close on its own.

attributes.name: countdown
attributes.description:
Enables a countdown that indicates the remaining time the alert will be displayed.
Typically used to indicate the remaining time before a whole app refresh.

events.name: sl-show
events.description: Emitted when the alert opens.

events.name: sl-after-show
events.description: Emitted after the alert opens and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-hide
events.description: Emitted when the alert closes.

events.name: sl-after-hide
events.description: Emitted after the alert closes and all animations are complete.

slots.description: The alert's main content.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: An icon to show in the alert. Works best with `<sl-icon>`.

    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);

<style>sl-animated-image { --control-box-size: 3rem; --icon-size: calc(var(--control-box-size) * 0.625); display: inline-flex; position: relative; cursor: pointer; }
img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
img[aria-hidden="true"] { display: none; }
.animated-image__control-box { display: flex; position: absolute; align-items: center; justify-content: center; top: calc(50% - var(--control-box-size) / 2); right: calc(50% - var(--control-box-size) / 2); width: var(--control-box-size); height: var(--control-box-size); font-size: var(--icon-size); background: none rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); border: 2px solid; border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-circle); color: white; pointer-events: none; transition: var(--sl-transition-fast) opacity; }
sl-animated-image([play]:hover) .animated-image__control-box { opacity: 1; }
sl-animated-image([play]:not(:hover)) .animated-image__control-box { opacity: 0; }
sl-animated-image([play]) slot[name="play-icon"], sl-animated-image(:not([play])) slot[name="pause-icon"] { display: none; }</style>

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: The path to the image to load.

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description: A description of the image used by assistive devices.

attributes.name: play
attributes.description: Plays the animation. When this attribute is remove, the animation will pause.

events.name: sl-load
events.description: Emitted when the image loads successfully.

events.name: sl-error
events.description: Emitted when the image fails to load.

slots.name: play-icon
slots.description: Optional play icon to use instead of the default. Works best with `<sl-icon>`.

slots.name: pause-icon
slots.description: Optional pause icon to use instead of the default. Works best with `<sl-icon>`.

@supports (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock {
    scrollbar-gutter: var(--sl-scroll-lock-gutter) !important;
  }

  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert::part(base) {
  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);
}
</style><sl-avatar image="https://placehold.co/40x40/339af0/fff?text=JS"><style>sl-avatar { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-avatar *, sl-avatar ::before, sl-avatar ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-avatar { display: inline-block; --size: 3rem; }
.avatar { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; width: var(--size); height: var(--size); background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-400); font-family: var(--sl-font-sans); font-size: calc(var(--size) * 0.5); font-weight: var(--sl-font-weight-normal); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); user-select: none; vertical-align: middle; }
.avatar--circle, .avatar--circle .avatar__image { border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-circle); }
.avatar--rounded, .avatar--rounded .avatar__image { border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium); }
.avatar--square { border-radius: 0px; }
.avatar__icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
.avatar__initials { line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; }
.avatar__image { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; overflow: hidden; }</style>

attributes.name: image
attributes.description: The image source to use for the avatar.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: A label to use to describe the avatar to assistive devices.

attributes.name: initials
attributes.description: Initials to use as a fallback when no image is available (1-2 characters max recommended).

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Indicates how the browser should load the image.

attributes.name: shape
attributes.description: The shape of the avatar.

events.name: sl-error
events.description: The image could not be loaded. This may because of an invalid URL, a temporary network condition, or some unknown cause.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: The default icon to use when no image or initials are present. Works best with `<sl-icon>`.

  --sl-input-label-font-size-medium: var(--sl-font-size-medium);
  --sl-input-label-font-size-large: var(--sl-font-size-large);
  --sl-input-label-color: inherit;

  --sl-input-help-text-font-size-small: var(--sl-font-size-x-small);
  --sl-input-help-text-font-size-medium: var(--sl-font-size-small);
  --sl-input-help-text-font-size-large: var(--sl-font-size-medium);
  --sl-input-help-text-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-500);

  --sl-toggle-size-small: 0.875rem;
  --sl-toggle-size-medium: 1.125rem;
  --sl-toggle-size-large: 1.375rem;

  --sl-overlay-background-color: hsl(240 3.8% 46.1% / 33%);

  --sl-panel-background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0);
  --sl-panel-border-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-200);
  --sl-panel-border-width: 1px;

  --sl-tooltip-border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium);
  --sl-tooltip-background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-800);
  --sl-tooltip-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0);
  --sl-tooltip-font-family: var(--sl-font-sans);
  --sl-tooltip-font-weight: var(--sl-font-weight-normal);
  --sl-tooltip-font-size: var(--sl-font-size-small);
  --sl-tooltip-line-height: var(--sl-line-height-dense);
  --sl-tooltip-padding: var(--sl-spacing-2x-small) var(--sl-spacing-x-small);
  --sl-tooltip-arrow-size: 6px;

  --sl-z-index-drawer: 700;
  --sl-z-index-dialog: 800;
  --sl-z-index-dropdown: 900;
  --sl-z-index-toast: 950;
  --sl-z-index-tooltip: 1000;
}

@supports (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock {
    scrollbar-gutter: var(--sl-scroll-lock-gutter) !important;
  }

  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert::part(base) {
  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);
}
</style><sl-badge variant="primary">Badge<style>sl-badge { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-badge *, sl-badge ::before, sl-badge ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-badge { display: inline-flex; }
.badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: max(12px, 0.75em); font-weight: var(--sl-font-weight-semibold); letter-spacing: var(--sl-letter-spacing-normal); line-height: 1; border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-small); border: solid 1px var(--sl-color-neutral-0); white-space: nowrap; padding: 0.35em 0.6em; user-select: none; cursor: inherit; }
.badge--primary { background-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); }
.badge--success { background-color: var(--sl-color-success-600); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); }
.badge--neutral { background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-600); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); }
.badge--warning { background-color: var(--sl-color-warning-600); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); }
.badge--danger { background-color: var(--sl-color-danger-600); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); }
.badge--pill { border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-pill); }
.badge--pulse { animation: 1.5s ease 0s infinite normal none running pulse; }
.badge--pulse.badge--primary { --pulse-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); }
.badge--pulse.badge--success { --pulse-color: var(--sl-color-success-600); }
.badge--pulse.badge--neutral { --pulse-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-600); }
.badge--pulse.badge--warning { --pulse-color: var(--sl-color-warning-600); }
.badge--pulse.badge--danger { --pulse-color: var(--sl-color-danger-600); }
@keyframes pulse { 
  0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 var(--pulse-color); }
  70% { box-shadow: transparent 0px 0px 0px 0.5rem; }
  100% { box-shadow: transparent 0px 0px 0px 0px; }
}</style>
<!---->
      <span part="base" role="status" class=" badge badge--primary ">
        <slot>Badge</slot>
      </span>
    </sl-badge></div>

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The button's theme variant.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The button's size.

attributes.name: caret
attributes.description: Draws the button with a caret. Used to indicate that the button triggers a dropdown menu or similar behavior.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the button.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Draws the button in a loading state.

attributes.name: outline
attributes.description: Draws an outlined button.

attributes.name: pill
attributes.description: Draws a pill-style button with rounded edges.

attributes.name: circle
attributes.description:
Draws a circular icon button. When this attribute is present, the button expects a single `<sl-icon>` in the
default slot.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description:
The type of button. Note that the default value is `button` instead of `submit`, which is opposite of how native
`<button>` elements behave. When the type is `submit`, the button will submit the surrounding form.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description:
The name of the button, submitted as a name/value pair with form data, but only when this button is the submitter.
This attribute is ignored when `href` is present.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
The value of the button, submitted as a pair with the button's name as part of the form data, but only when this
button is the submitter. This attribute is ignored when `href` is present.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: When set, the underlying button will be rendered as an `<a>` with this `href` instead of a `<button>`.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Tells the browser where to open the link. Only used when `href` is present.

attributes.name: rel
attributes.description:
When using `href`, this attribute will map to the underlying link's `rel` attribute. Unlike regular links, the
default is `noreferrer noopener` to prevent security exploits. However, if you're using `target` to point to a
specific tab/window, this will prevent that from working correctly. You can remove or change the default value by
setting the attribute to an empty string or a value of your choice, respectively.

attributes.name: download
attributes.description: Tells the browser to download the linked file as this filename. Only used when `href` is present.

attributes.name: form
attributes.description:
The "form owner" to associate the button with. If omitted, the closest containing form will be used instead. The
value of this attribute must be an id of a form in the same document or shadow root as the button.

attributes.name: formaction
attributes.description: Used to override the form owner's `action` attribute.

attributes.name: formenctype
attributes.description: Used to override the form owner's `enctype` attribute.

attributes.name: formmethod
attributes.description: Used to override the form owner's `method` attribute.

attributes.name: formnovalidate
attributes.description: Used to override the form owner's `novalidate` attribute.

attributes.name: formtarget
attributes.description: Used to override the form owner's `target` attribute.

events.name: sl-blur
events.description: Emitted when the button loses focus.

events.name: sl-focus
events.description: Emitted when the button gains focus.

events.name: sl-invalid
events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.

slots.description: The button's label.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: A presentational prefix icon or similar element.

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: A presentational suffix icon or similar element.

</style><sl-carousel navigation pagination loop><style>sl-carousel { box-sizing: border-box; }

[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-carousel { --slide-gap: var(--sl-spacing-medium, 1rem); --aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; --scroll-hint: 0px; display: flex; }
.carousel { display: grid; grid-template: ". slides ." 1fr ". pagination ." min-content / min-content 1fr min-content; gap: var(--sl-spacing-medium); align-items: center; min-height: 100%; min-width: 100%; position: relative; }
.carousel__pagination { grid-area: pagination; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: var(--sl-spacing-small); }
.carousel__slides { grid-area: slides; display: grid; height: 100%; width: 100%; place-items: center; overflow: auto; overscroll-behavior-x: contain; scrollbar-width: none; aspect-ratio: calc(var(--aspect-ratio) * var(--slides-per-page)); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-small); --slide-size: calc((100% - (var(--slides-per-page) - 1) * var(--slide-gap)) / var(--slides-per-page)); }
@media (prefers-reduced-motion) {
  :where(.carousel__slides) { scroll-behavior: auto; }
}
.carousel__slides--horizontal { grid-auto-flow: column; grid-auto-columns: var(--slide-size); grid-auto-rows: 100%; column-gap: var(--slide-gap); scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; scroll-padding-inline: var(--scroll-hint); padding-inline: var(--scroll-hint); overflow-y: hidden; }
.carousel__slides--vertical { grid-auto-flow: row; grid-auto-columns: 100%; grid-auto-rows: var(--slide-size); row-gap: var(--slide-gap); scroll-snap-type: y mandatory; scroll-padding-block: var(--scroll-hint); padding-block: var(--scroll-hint); overflow-x: hidden; }
.carousel__slides--dragging { }
sl-carousel([vertical]) ::slotted(sl-carousel-item) { height: 100%; }
.carousel__slides::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
.carousel__navigation { grid-area: navigation; display: contents; font-size: var(--sl-font-size-x-large); }
.carousel__navigation-button { flex: 0 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; background: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-small); font-size: inherit; color: var(--sl-color-neutral-600); padding: var(--sl-spacing-x-small); cursor: pointer; transition: var(--sl-transition-medium) color; appearance: none; }
.carousel__navigation-button--disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
.carousel__navigation-button--disabled::part(base) { pointer-events: none; }
.carousel__navigation-button--previous { grid-area: 1 / 1; }
.carousel__navigation-button--next { grid-area: 1 / 3; }
.carousel__pagination-item { display: block; cursor: pointer; background-image: none; background-position: initial; background-size: initial; background-repeat: initial; background-attachment: initial; background-origin: initial; background-clip: initial; border: 0px; border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-circle); width: var(--sl-spacing-small); height: var(--sl-spacing-small); background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-300); padding: 0px; margin: 0px; }
.carousel__pagination-item--active { background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-700); transform: scale(1.2); }
.carousel__slides:focus-visible, .carousel__navigation-button:focus-visible, .carousel__pagination-item:focus-visible { outline: var(--sl-focus-ring); outline-offset: var(--sl-focus-ring-offset); }</style>

          <slot></slot>

                  <slot name="previous-icon">
                    <sl-icon library="system" name="chevron-left" aria-hidden="true"></sl-icon>
                  </slot>
                </div>

                <div part="navigation-button navigation-button--next" aria-controls="scroll-container" class=" carousel__navigation-button carousel__navigation-button--next " aria-label="Next slide" aria-disabled="false">
                  <slot name="next-icon">

attributes.name: loop
attributes.description: When set, allows the user to navigate the carousel in the same direction indefinitely.

attributes.name: navigation
attributes.description: When set, show the carousel's navigation.

attributes.name: pagination
attributes.description: When set, show the carousel's pagination indicators.

attributes.name: autoplay
attributes.description: When set, the slides will scroll automatically when the user is not interacting with them.

attributes.name: autoplay-interval
attributes.description: Specifies the amount of time, in milliseconds, between each automatic scroll.

attributes.name: slides-per-page
attributes.description: Specifies how many slides should be shown at a given time.

attributes.name: slides-per-move
attributes.description:
Specifies the number of slides the carousel will advance when scrolling, useful when specifying a `slides-per-page`
greater than one. It can't be higher than `slides-per-page`.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Specifies the orientation in which the carousel will lay out.

attributes.name: mouse-dragging
attributes.description: When set, it is possible to scroll through the slides by dragging them with the mouse.

events.name: sl-slide-change
events.description: Emitted when the active slide changes.

slots.description: The carousel's main content, one or more `<sl-carousel-item>` elements.

slots.name: next-icon
slots.description: Optional next icon to use instead of the default. Works best with `<sl-icon>`.

slots.name: previous-icon
slots.description: Optional previous icon to use instead of the default. Works best with `<sl-icon>`.

          </span>

          <div part="label" class="checkbox__label">
            <slot></slot>

        </label>

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the checkbox, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The current value of the checkbox, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The checkbox's size.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the checkbox.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Draws the checkbox in a checked state.

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description:
Draws the checkbox in an indeterminate state. This is usually applied to checkboxes that represents a "select
all/none" behavior when associated checkboxes have a mix of checked and unchecked states.

attributes.name: form
attributes.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element. This attribute allows you
to place the form control outside of a form and associate it with the form that has this `id`. The form must be in
the same document or shadow root for this to work.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Makes the checkbox a required field.

attributes.name: help-text
attributes.description: The checkbox's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the `help-text` slot instead.

events.name: sl-blur
events.description: Emitted when the checkbox loses focus.

events.name: sl-change
events.description: Emitted when the checked state changes.

events.name: sl-focus
events.description: Emitted when the checkbox gains focus.

events.name: sl-input
events.description: Emitted when the checkbox receives input.

events.name: sl-invalid
events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.

slots.description: The checkbox's label.

slots.name: help-text
slots.description: Text that describes how to use the checkbox. Alternatively, you can use the `help-text` attribute.

.color-picker--inline:focus-visible { outline: var(--sl-focus-ring); outline-offset: var(--sl-focus-ring-offset); }
.color-picker__grid { position: relative; height: var(--grid-height); background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0%, rgb(0, 0, 0) 100%), linear-gradient(to right, rgb(255, 255, 255) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 100%); border-top-left-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium); border-top-right-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium); cursor: crosshair; forced-color-adjust: none; }
.color-picker__grid-handle { position: absolute; width: var(--grid-handle-size); height: var(--grid-handle-size); border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 0px 0px 0px 1px; border: 2px solid white; margin-top: calc(var(--grid-handle-size) / -2); margin-left: calc(var(--grid-handle-size) / -2); transition: var(--sl-transition-fast) scale; }

.color-picker__controls { padding: var(--sl-spacing-small); display: flex; align-items: center; }
.color-picker__sliders { flex: 1 1 auto; }
.color-picker__slider { position: relative; height: var(--slider-height); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-pill); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset; forced-color-adjust: none; }

.color-picker__slider-handle { position: absolute; top: calc(50% - var(--slider-handle-size) / 2); width: var(--slider-handle-size); height: var(--slider-handle-size); background-color: white; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 0px 0px 0px 1px; margin-left: calc(var(--slider-handle-size) / -2); }

.color-picker__alpha .color-picker__alpha-gradient { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; }
.color-picker__preview { flex: 0 0 auto; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; width: 2.25rem; height: 2.25rem; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-circle); background: none; margin-left: var(--sl-spacing-small); cursor: copy; forced-color-adjust: none; }
.color-picker__preview::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset; background-color: var(--preview-color); }

.color-picker__preview-color { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.125); }
.color-picker__preview-color--copied { animation: 0.75s ease 0s 1 normal none running pulse; }
@keyframes pulse {

  70% { box-shadow: transparent 0px 0px 0px 0.5rem; }

}
.color-picker__user-input { display: flex; padding: 0 var(--sl-spacing-small) var(--sl-spacing-small) var(--sl-spacing-small); }
.color-picker__user-input sl-input { min-width: 0px; flex: 1 1 auto; }
.color-picker__user-input sl-button-group { margin-left: var(--sl-spacing-small); }
.color-picker__user-input sl-button { min-width: 3.25rem; max-width: 3.25rem; font-size: 1rem; }
.color-picker__swatches { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(8, 1fr); gap: 0.5rem; justify-items: center; border-top: solid 1px var(--sl-color-neutral-200); padding: var(--sl-spacing-small); forced-color-adjust: none; }
.color-picker__swatch { position: relative; width: var(--swatch-size); height: var(--swatch-size); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-small); }
.color-picker__swatch .color-picker__swatch-color { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.125); border-radius: inherit; cursor: pointer; }
.color-picker__swatch:focus-visible { outline: var(--sl-focus-ring); outline-offset: var(--sl-focus-ring-offset); }
.color-picker__transparent-bg { background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--sl-color-neutral-300) 25%, transparent 25%),
      linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--sl-color-neutral-300) 75%),
      linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--sl-color-neutral-300) 75%),
      linear-gradient(45deg, var(--sl-color-neutral-300) 25%, transparent 25%); background-size: 10px 10px; background-position: 0px 0px, 0px 0px, -5px -5px, 5px 5px; }
.color-picker--disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
.color-picker--disabled .color-picker__grid, .color-picker--disabled .color-picker__grid-handle, .color-picker--disabled .color-picker__slider, .color-picker--disabled .color-picker__slider-handle, .color-picker--disabled .color-picker__preview, .color-picker--disabled .color-picker__swatch, .color-picker--disabled .color-picker__swatch-color { pointer-events: none; }
.color-dropdown::part(panel) { max-height: none; background-color: var(--sl-panel-background-color); border: solid var(--sl-panel-border-width) var(--sl-panel-border-color); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium); overflow: visible; }
.color-dropdown__trigger { display: inline-block; position: relative; background-color: transparent; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; cursor: pointer; forced-color-adjust: none; }
.color-dropdown__trigger.color-dropdown__trigger--small { width: var(--sl-input-height-small); height: var(--sl-input-height-small); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-circle); }
.color-dropdown__trigger.color-dropdown__trigger--medium { width: var(--sl-input-height-medium); height: var(--sl-input-height-medium); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-circle); }
.color-dropdown__trigger.color-dropdown__trigger--large { width: var(--sl-input-height-large); height: var(--sl-input-height-large); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-circle); }
.color-dropdown__trigger::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; background-color: currentcolor; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px var(--sl-input-border-color),

.color-dropdown__trigger:focus-visible { outline: none; }
.color-dropdown__trigger:focus-visible:not(.color-dropdown__trigger--disabled) { outline: var(--sl-focus-ring); outline-offset: var(--sl-focus-ring-offset); }

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
The current value of the color picker. The value's format will vary based the `format` attribute. To get the value
in a specific format, use the `getFormattedValue()` method. The value is submitted as a name/value pair with form
data.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
The color picker's label. This will not be displayed, but it will be announced by assistive devices. If you need to
display HTML, you can use the `label` slot` instead.

attributes.name: format
attributes.description:
The format to use. If opacity is enabled, these will translate to HEXA, RGBA, HSLA, and HSVA respectively. The color
picker will accept user input in any format (including CSS color names) and convert it to the desired format.

attributes.name: inline
attributes.description: Renders the color picker inline rather than in a dropdown.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Determines the size of the color picker's trigger. This has no effect on inline color pickers.

attributes.name: no-format-toggle
attributes.description: Removes the button that lets users toggle between format.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the form control, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the color picker.

attributes.name: hoist
attributes.description:
Enable this option to prevent the panel from being clipped when the component is placed inside a container with
`overflow: auto|scroll`. Hoisting uses a fixed positioning strategy that works in many, but not all, scenarios.

attributes.name: opacity
attributes.description: Shows the opacity slider. Enabling this will cause the formatted value to be HEXA, RGBA, or HSLA.

attributes.name: uppercase
attributes.description: By default, values are lowercase. With this attribute, values will be uppercase instead.

attributes.name: swatches
attributes.description:
One or more predefined color swatches to display as presets in the color picker. Can include any format the color
picker can parse, including HEX(A), RGB(A), HSL(A), HSV(A), and CSS color names. Each color must be separated by a
semicolon (`;`). Alternatively, you can pass an array of color values to this property using JavaScript.

attributes.name: form
attributes.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element. This attribute allows you
to place the form control outside of a form and associate it with the form that has this `id`. The form must be in
the same document or shadow root for this to work.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Makes the color picker a required field.

events.name: sl-blur
events.description: Emitted when the color picker loses focus.

events.name: sl-change
events.description: Emitted when the color picker's value changes.

events.name: sl-focus
events.description: Emitted when the color picker receives focus.

events.name: sl-input
events.description: Emitted when the color picker receives input.

events.name: sl-invalid
events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.

slots.name: label
slots.description: The color picker's form label. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.

attributes.name: open

Indicates whether or not the details is open. You can toggle this attribute to show and hide the details, or you
can use the `show()` and `hide()` methods and this attribute will reflect the details' open state.

attributes.description: The summary to show in the header. If you need to display HTML, use the `summary` slot instead.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the details so it can't be toggled.

events.description: Emitted when the details opens.

events.name: sl-after-show
events.description: Emitted after the details opens and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-hide
events.description: Emitted when the details closes.

events.name: sl-after-hide
events.description: Emitted after the details closes and all animations are complete.

slots.description: The details' main content.

slots.name: summary
slots.description: The details' summary. Alternatively, you can use the `summary` attribute.

slots.name: expand-icon
slots.description: Optional expand icon to use instead of the default. Works best with `<sl-icon>`.

slots.name: collapse-icon

Dialog Title
This is the dialog content.

Dialog

This is the dialog content.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description:
Indicates whether or not the dialog is open. You can toggle this attribute to show and hide the dialog, or you can
use the `show()` and `hide()` methods and this attribute will reflect the dialog's open state.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
The dialog's label as displayed in the header. You should always include a relevant label even when using
`no-header`, as it is required for proper accessibility. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.

attributes.name: no-header
attributes.description:
Disables the header. This will also remove the default close button, so please ensure you provide an easy,
accessible way for users to dismiss the dialog.

events.name: sl-show
events.description: Emitted when the dialog opens.

events.name: sl-after-show
events.description: Emitted after the dialog opens and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-hide
events.description: Emitted when the dialog closes.

events.name: sl-after-hide
events.description: Emitted after the dialog closes and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-initial-focus
events.description: Emitted when the dialog opens and is ready to receive focus. Calling `event.preventDefault()` will prevent focusing and allow you to set it on a different element, such as an input.

events.name: sl-request-close
events.description: Emitted when the user attempts to close the dialog by clicking the close button, clicking the overlay, or pressing escape. Calling `event.preventDefault()` will keep the dialog open. Avoid using this unless closing the dialog will result in destructive behavior such as data loss.

slots.description: The dialog's main content.

slots.name: label
slots.description: The dialog's label. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.

slots.name: header-actions
slots.description: Optional actions to add to the header. Works best with `<sl-icon-button>`.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: The dialog's footer, usually one or more buttons representing various options.

@supports (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock {
    scrollbar-gutter: var(--sl-scroll-lock-gutter) !important;
  }

  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert::part(base) {
  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);
}
</style><sl-divider><style>sl-divider { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-divider *, sl-divider ::before, sl-divider ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-divider { --color: var(--sl-panel-border-color); --width: var(--sl-panel-border-width); --spacing: var(--sl-spacing-medium); }
sl-divider(:not([vertical])) { display: block; border-top: solid var(--width) var(--color); margin: var(--spacing) 0; }
sl-divider([vertical]) { display: inline-block; height: 100%; border-left: solid var(--width) var(--color); margin: 0 var(--spacing); }</style>
<!----></sl-divider></div>

attributes.name: vertical
attributes.description: Draws the divider in a vertical orientation.

tags.ssrSnapshot:
Drawer Title
This is the drawer content.

Drawer

This is the drawer content.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description:
Indicates whether or not the drawer is open. You can toggle this attribute to show and hide the drawer, or you can
use the `show()` and `hide()` methods and this attribute will reflect the drawer's open state.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
The drawer's label as displayed in the header. You should always include a relevant label even when using
`no-header`, as it is required for proper accessibility. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: The direction from which the drawer will open.

attributes.name: contained
attributes.description:
By default, the drawer slides out of its containing block (usually the viewport). To make the drawer slide out of
its parent element, set this attribute and add `position: relative` to the parent.

attributes.name: no-header
attributes.description:
Removes the header. This will also remove the default close button, so please ensure you provide an easy,
accessible way for users to dismiss the drawer.

events.name: sl-show
events.description: Emitted when the drawer opens.

events.name: sl-after-show
events.description: Emitted after the drawer opens and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-hide
events.description: Emitted when the drawer closes.

events.name: sl-after-hide
events.description: Emitted after the drawer closes and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-initial-focus
events.description: Emitted when the drawer opens and is ready to receive focus. Calling `event.preventDefault()` will prevent focusing and allow you to set it on a different element, such as an input.

events.name: sl-request-close
events.description: Emitted when the user attempts to close the drawer by clicking the close button, clicking the overlay, or pressing escape. Calling `event.preventDefault()` will keep the drawer open. Avoid using this unless closing the drawer will result in destructive behavior such as data loss.

slots.description: The drawer's main content.

slots.name: label
slots.description: The drawer's label. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.

slots.name: header-actions
slots.description: Optional actions to add to the header. Works best with `<sl-icon-button>`.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: The drawer's footer, usually one or more buttons representing various options.

</style><sl-dropdown open><sl-button slot="trigger" caret>Dropdown</sl-button><sl-menu><sl-menu-item>Option 1</sl-menu-item><sl-menu-item>Option 2</sl-menu-item></sl-menu><style>sl-dropdown { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-dropdown *, sl-dropdown ::before, sl-dropdown ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-dropdown { display: inline-block; }
.dropdown::part(popup) { z-index: var(--sl-z-index-dropdown); }
.dropdown[data-current-placement^="top"]::part(popup) { transform-origin: center bottom; }
.dropdown[data-current-placement^="bottom"]::part(popup) { transform-origin: center top; }
.dropdown[data-current-placement^="left"]::part(popup) { transform-origin: right center; }
.dropdown[data-current-placement^="right"]::part(popup) { transform-origin: left center; }
.dropdown__trigger { display: block; }
.dropdown__panel { font-family: var(--sl-font-sans); font-size: var(--sl-font-size-medium); font-weight: var(--sl-font-weight-normal); box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium); pointer-events: none; }
.dropdown--open .dropdown__panel { display: block; pointer-events: all; }
::slotted(sl-menu) { max-width: var(--auto-size-available-width) !important; max-height: var(--auto-size-available-height) !important; }</style>
<!---->
      <sl-popup part="base" exportparts="popup:base__popup" id="dropdown" flip="" shift="" auto-size="vertical" auto-size-padding="10" placement="bottom-start" distance="0" skidding="0" strategy="absolute" class=" dropdown dropdown--open " active="" data-current-placement="bottom-start" style="--auto-size-available-height: 662px;">
        <slot name="trigger"><sl-button slot="trigger" caret="" variant="default" size="medium" data-optional="" data-valid="">Dropdown</sl-button></slot>

        <div aria-labelledby="dropdown" aria-hidden="false">
          <slot><sl-menu role="menu"><sl-menu-item role="menuitem" aria-disabled="false" tabindex="0">Option 1</sl-menu-item><sl-menu-item role="menuitem" aria-disabled="false" tabindex="-1">Option 2</sl-menu-item></sl-menu></slot>
        </div>
      </sl-popup>
    </sl-dropdown></div>

attributes.name: open
attributes.description:
Indicates whether or not the dropdown is open. You can toggle this attribute to show and hide the dropdown, or you
can use the `show()` and `hide()` methods and this attribute will reflect the dropdown's open state.

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description:
The preferred placement of the dropdown panel. Note that the actual placement may vary as needed to keep the panel
inside of the viewport.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the dropdown so the panel will not open.

attributes.name: stay-open-on-select
attributes.description:
By default, the dropdown is closed when an item is selected. This attribute will keep it open instead. Useful for
dropdowns that allow for multiple interactions.

attributes.name: distance
attributes.description: The distance in pixels from which to offset the panel away from its trigger.

attributes.name: skidding
attributes.description: The distance in pixels from which to offset the panel along its trigger.

attributes.name: hoist
attributes.description:
Enable this option to prevent the panel from being clipped when the component is placed inside a container with
`overflow: auto|scroll`. Hoisting uses a fixed positioning strategy that works in many, but not all, scenarios.

attributes.name: sync
attributes.description: Syncs the popup width or height to that of the trigger element.

events.name: sl-show
events.description: Emitted when the dropdown opens.

events.name: sl-after-show
events.description: Emitted after the dropdown opens and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-hide
events.description: Emitted when the dropdown closes.

events.name: sl-after-hide
events.description: Emitted after the dropdown closes and all animations are complete.

slots.description: The dropdown's main content.

slots.name: trigger
slots.description: The dropdown's trigger, usually a `<sl-button>` element.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the icon to draw. Available names depend on the icon library being used.

attributes.name: src
attributes.description:
An external URL of an SVG file. Be sure you trust the content you are including, as it will be executed as code and
can result in XSS attacks.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
An alternate description to use for assistive devices. If omitted, the icon will be considered presentational and
ignored by assistive devices.

attributes.name: library
attributes.description: The name of a registered custom icon library.

events.name: sl-load
events.description: Emitted when the icon has loaded. When using `spriteSheet: true` this will not emit.

events.name: sl-error
events.description: Emitted when the icon fails to load due to an error. When using `spriteSheet: true` this will not emit.

  }

    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert::part(base) {
  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);

</style><sl-icon-button name="gear" label="Settings"><style>sl-icon-button { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-icon-button *, sl-icon-button ::before, sl-icon-button ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-icon-button { display: inline-block; color: var(--sl-color-neutral-600); }
.icon-button { flex: 0 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; background: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium); font-size: inherit; color: inherit; padding: var(--sl-spacing-x-small); cursor: pointer; transition: var(--sl-transition-x-fast) color; appearance: none; }
.icon-button:hover:not(.icon-button--disabled), .icon-button:focus-visible:not(.icon-button--disabled) { color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); }
.icon-button:active:not(.icon-button--disabled) { color: var(--sl-color-primary-700); }
.icon-button:focus { outline: none; }
.icon-button--disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
.icon-button:focus-visible { outline: var(--sl-focus-ring); outline-offset: var(--sl-focus-ring-offset); }
.icon-button__icon { pointer-events: none; }</style>
<!---->
      <div part="base" class=" icon-button " type="button" role="button" aria-disabled="false" aria-label="Settings" tabindex="0">
        <sl-icon class="icon-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" name="gear" library="default"></sl-icon>
      </div>
    </sl-icon-button></div>

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the icon to draw. Available names depend on the icon library being used.

attributes.name: library
attributes.description: The name of a registered custom icon library.

attributes.name: src
attributes.description:
An external URL of an SVG file. Be sure you trust the content you are including, as it will be executed as code and
can result in XSS attacks.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: When set, the underlying button will be rendered as an `<a>` with this `href` instead of a `<button>`.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Tells the browser where to open the link. Only used when `href` is set.

attributes.name: download
attributes.description: Tells the browser to download the linked file as this filename. Only used when `href` is set.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
A description that gets read by assistive devices. For optimal accessibility, you should always include a label
that describes what the icon button does.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the button.

events.name: sl-blur
events.description: Emitted when the icon button loses focus.

events.name: sl-focus
events.description: Emitted when the icon button gains focus.

<style>sl-image-comparer { --divider-width: 2px; --handle-size: 2.5rem; display: inline-block; position: relative; }
.image-comparer { max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; overflow: hidden; }
.image-comparer__before, .image-comparer__after { display: block; pointer-events: none; }
.image-comparer__before::slotted(img), .image-comparer__after::slotted(img), .image-comparer__before::slotted(svg), .image-comparer__after::slotted(svg) { display: block; height: auto; max-width: 100% !important; }
.image-comparer__after { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 100%; width: 100%; }
.image-comparer__divider { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: absolute; top: 0px; width: var(--divider-width); height: 100%; background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); translate: calc(var(--divider-width) / -2); cursor: ew-resize; }
.image-comparer__handle { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: absolute; top: calc(50% - (var(--handle-size) / 2)); width: var(--handle-size); height: var(--handle-size); background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-circle); font-size: calc(var(--handle-size) * 0.5); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-700); cursor: inherit; z-index: 10; }
.image-comparer__handle:focus-visible { outline: var(--sl-focus-ring); outline-offset: var(--sl-focus-ring-offset); }</style>

            <slot name="before"></slot>
          </div>

          <div part="after" class="image-comparer__after" style="clip-path:inset(0 50% 0 0);">
            <slot name="after"></slot>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div part="divider" class="image-comparer__divider" style="left:50%;">
          <div part="handle" class="image-comparer__handle" role="scrollbar" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100" aria-controls="image-comparer" tabindex="0" aria-valuenow="50">
            <slot name="handle">
              <sl-icon library="system" name="grip-vertical" aria-hidden="true"></sl-icon>
            </slot>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </sl-image-comparer></div>

attributes.name: position

slots.name: after
slots.description: The after image, an `` or `

slots.name: handle
slots.description: The icon used inside the handle.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description:
The type of input. Works the same as a native `<input>` element, but only a subset of types are supported. Defaults
to `text`.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the input, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The current value of the input, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The input's size.

attributes.name: filled
attributes.description: Draws a filled input.

attributes.name: pill
attributes.description: Draws a pill-style input with rounded edges.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The input's label. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.

attributes.name: help-text
attributes.description: The input's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the `help-text` slot instead.

attributes.name: clearable
attributes.description: Adds a clear button when the input is not empty.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the input.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text to show as a hint when the input is empty.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Makes the input readonly.

attributes.name: password-toggle
attributes.description: Adds a button to toggle the password's visibility. Only applies to password types.

attributes.name: password-visible
attributes.description: Determines whether or not the password is currently visible. Only applies to password input types.

attributes.name: no-spin-buttons
attributes.description: Hides the browser's built-in increment/decrement spin buttons for number inputs.

attributes.name: form
attributes.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element. This attribute allows you
to place the form control outside of a form and associate it with the form that has this `id`. The form must be in
the same document or shadow root for this to work.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Makes the input a required field.

attributes.name: pattern
attributes.description: A regular expression pattern to validate input against.

attributes.name: minlength
attributes.description: The minimum length of input that will be considered valid.

attributes.name: maxlength
attributes.description: The maximum length of input that will be considered valid.

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: The input's minimum value. Only applies to date and number input types.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: The input's maximum value. Only applies to date and number input types.

attributes.name: step
attributes.description:
Specifies the granularity that the value must adhere to, or the special value `any` which means no stepping is
implied, allowing any numeric value. Only applies to date and number input types.

attributes.name: autocapitalize
attributes.description: Controls whether and how text input is automatically capitalized as it is entered by the user.

attributes.name: autocorrect
attributes.description: Indicates whether the browser's autocorrect feature is on or off.

attributes.name: autocomplete
attributes.description:
Specifies what permission the browser has to provide assistance in filling out form field values. Refer to
[this page on MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/autocomplete) for available values.

attributes.name: autofocus
attributes.description: Indicates that the input should receive focus on page load.

attributes.name: enterkeyhint
attributes.description: Used to customize the label or icon of the Enter key on virtual keyboards.

attributes.name: spellcheck
attributes.description: Enables spell checking on the input.

attributes.name: inputmode
attributes.description:
Tells the browser what type of data will be entered by the user, allowing it to display the appropriate virtual
keyboard on supportive devices.

events.name: sl-blur
events.description: Emitted when the control loses focus.

events.name: sl-change
events.description: Emitted when an alteration to the control's value is committed by the user.

events.name: sl-clear
events.description: Emitted when the clear button is activated.

events.name: sl-focus
events.description: Emitted when the control gains focus.

events.name: sl-input
events.description: Emitted when the control receives input.

events.name: sl-invalid
events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.

slots.name: label
slots.description: The input's label. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Used to prepend a presentational icon or similar element to the input.

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Used to append a presentational icon or similar element to the input.

slots.name: clear-icon
slots.description: An icon to use in lieu of the default clear icon.

slots.name: show-password-icon
slots.description: An icon to use in lieu of the default show password icon.

slots.name: hide-password-icon
slots.description: An icon to use in lieu of the default hide password icon.

slots.name: help-text
slots.description: Text that describes how to use the input. Alternatively, you can use the `help-text` attribute.

    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {

  top: 0;

  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);

  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;

events.name: sl-select
events.description: Emitted when a menu item is selected.

slots.description: The menu's content, including menu items, menu labels, and dividers.

<style>sl-menu-item { --submenu-offset: -2px; display: block; }
sl-menu-item([inert]) { display: none; }
.menu-item { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: stretch; font-family: var(--sl-font-sans); font-size: var(--sl-font-size-medium); font-weight: var(--sl-font-weight-normal); line-height: var(--sl-line-height-normal); letter-spacing: var(--sl-letter-spacing-normal); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-700); padding: var(--sl-spacing-2x-small) var(--sl-spacing-2x-small); transition: var(--sl-transition-fast) fill; user-select: none; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; }
.menu-item.menu-item--disabled { outline: none; opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
.menu-item.menu-item--loading { outline: none; cursor: wait; }
.menu-item.menu-item--loading :not(sl-spinner) { opacity: 0.5; }
.menu-item--loading sl-spinner { --indicator-color: currentColor; --track-width: 1px; position: absolute; font-size: 0.75em; top: calc(50% - 0.5em); left: 0.65rem; opacity: 1; }
.menu-item .menu-item__label { flex: 1 1 auto; display: inline-block; text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden; }
.menu-item .menu-item__prefix { flex: 0 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; }
.menu-item .menu-item__prefix::slotted(*) { margin-inline-end: var(--sl-spacing-x-small); }
.menu-item .menu-item__suffix { flex: 0 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; }
.menu-item .menu-item__suffix::slotted(*) { margin-inline-start: var(--sl-spacing-x-small); }
.menu-item--submenu-expanded::after { content: ""; position: fixed; z-index: calc(var(--sl-z-index-dropdown) - 1); inset: 0px; clip-path: polygon(
      var(--safe-triangle-cursor-x, 0) var(--safe-triangle-cursor-y, 0),
      var(--safe-triangle-submenu-start-x, 0) var(--safe-triangle-submenu-start-y, 0),
      var(--safe-triangle-submenu-end-x, 0) var(--safe-triangle-submenu-end-y, 0)
    ); }
sl-menu-item(:focus-visible) { outline: none; }
sl-menu-item(:hover:not([aria-disabled="true"], :focus-visible)) .menu-item, .menu-item--submenu-expanded { background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-100); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-1000); }
sl-menu-item(:focus-visible) .menu-item { outline: none; background-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); opacity: 1; }
.menu-item .menu-item__check, .menu-item .menu-item__chevron { flex: 0 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.5em; visibility: hidden; }
.menu-item--checked .menu-item__check, .menu-item--has-submenu .menu-item__chevron { visibility: visible; }
sl-popup::part(popup) { box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large); z-index: var(--sl-z-index-dropdown); margin-left: var(--submenu-offset); }
.menu-item--rtl sl-popup::part(popup) { margin-left: calc(-1 * var(--submenu-offset)); }
@media (forced-colors: active) {
  sl-menu-item(:hover:not([aria-disabled="true"])) .menu-item, sl-menu-item(:focus-visible) .menu-item { outline: selecteditem dashed 1px; outline-offset: -1px; }
}
::slotted(sl-menu) { max-width: var(--auto-size-available-width) !important; max-height: var(--auto-size-available-height) !important; }</style>

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The type of menu item to render. To use `checked`, this value must be set to `checkbox`.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Draws the item in a checked state.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: A unique value to store in the menu item. This can be used as a way to identify menu items when selected.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Draws the menu item in a loading state.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Draws the menu item in a disabled state, preventing selection.

slots.description: The menu item's label.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Used to prepend an icon or similar element to the menu item.

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Used to append an icon or similar element to the menu item.

slots.name: submenu
slots.description: Used to denote a nested menu.

  }

  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert::part(base) {
  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);
}
</style><sl-progress-bar value="50"><style>sl-progress-bar { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-progress-bar *, sl-progress-bar ::before, sl-progress-bar ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-progress-bar { --height: 1rem; --track-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-200); --indicator-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); --label-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); display: block; }
.progress-bar { position: relative; background-color: var(--track-color); height: var(--height); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-pill); box-shadow: inset var(--sl-shadow-small); overflow: hidden; }
.progress-bar__indicator { height: 100%; font-family: var(--sl-font-sans); font-size: 12px; font-weight: var(--sl-font-weight-normal); background-color: var(--indicator-color); color: var(--label-color); text-align: center; line-height: var(--height); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; transition: width 400ms, background-color 400ms; user-select: none; }
.progress-bar--indeterminate .progress-bar__indicator { position: absolute; animation: 2.5s cubic-bezier(0.37, 0, 0.63, 1) 0s infinite normal none running indeterminate; }
.progress-bar--indeterminate.progress-bar--rtl .progress-bar__indicator { animation-name: indeterminate-rtl; }
@media (forced-colors: active) {
  .progress-bar { outline: selecteditem solid 1px; background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); }
  .progress-bar__indicator { outline: selecteditem solid 1px; background-color: selecteditem; }
}
@keyframes indeterminate { 
  0% { left: -50%; width: 50%; }
  75%, 100% { left: 100%; width: 50%; }
}
@keyframes indeterminate-rtl { 
  0% { right: -50%; width: 50%; }
  75%, 100% { right: 100%; width: 50%; }
}</style>

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description: When true, percentage is ignored, the label is hidden, and the progress bar is drawn in an indeterminate state.

attributes.description: A custom label for assistive devices.

slots.description: A label to show inside the progress indicator.

sl-radio *, sl-radio ::before, sl-radio ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }

<style>sl-radio { display: block; }
sl-radio(:focus-visible) { outline: 0px; }
.radio { display: inline-flex; font-family: var(--sl-input-font-family); font-size: var(--sl-input-font-size-medium); font-weight: var(--sl-input-font-weight); color: var(--sl-input-label-color); vertical-align: middle; cursor: pointer; }
.radio--small { --toggle-size: var(--sl-toggle-size-small); font-size: var(--sl-input-font-size-small); }
.radio--medium { --toggle-size: var(--sl-toggle-size-medium); font-size: var(--sl-input-font-size-medium); }
.radio--large { --toggle-size: var(--sl-toggle-size-large); font-size: var(--sl-input-font-size-large); }
.radio__checked-icon { display: inline-flex; width: var(--toggle-size); height: var(--toggle-size); }
.radio__control { flex: 0 0 auto; position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: var(--toggle-size); height: var(--toggle-size); border: solid var(--sl-input-border-width) var(--sl-input-border-color); border-radius: 50%; background-color: var(--sl-input-background-color); color: transparent; transition: var(--sl-transition-fast) border-color,
      var(--sl-transition-fast) background-color,
      var(--sl-transition-fast) color,
      var(--sl-transition-fast) box-shadow; }
.radio__input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; padding: 0px; margin: 0px; pointer-events: none; }
.radio:not(.radio--checked):not(.radio--disabled) .radio__control:hover { border-color: var(--sl-input-border-color-hover); background-color: var(--sl-input-background-color-hover); }
.radio--checked .radio__control { color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); border-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); background-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); }
.radio.radio--checked:not(.radio--disabled) .radio__control:hover { border-color: var(--sl-color-primary-500); background-color: var(--sl-color-primary-500); }
sl-radio(:focus-visible) .radio__control { outline: var(--sl-focus-ring); outline-offset: var(--sl-focus-ring-offset); }
.radio--disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
.radio:not(.radio--checked) svg circle { opacity: 0; }
.radio__label { display: inline-block; color: var(--sl-input-label-color); line-height: var(--toggle-size); margin-inline-start: 0.5em; user-select: none; }</style>

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The radio's value. When selected, the radio group will receive this value.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
The radio's size. When used inside a radio group, the size will be determined by the radio group's size so this
attribute can typically be omitted.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the radio.

events.name: sl-blur
events.description: Emitted when the control loses focus.

events.name: sl-focus
events.description: Emitted when the control gains focus.

slots.description: The radio's label.

  --sl-input-spacing-small: var(--sl-spacing-small);
  --sl-input-spacing-medium: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
  --sl-input-spacing-large: var(--sl-spacing-large);

  --sl-input-focus-ring-color: hsl(198.6 88.7% 48.4% / 40%);
  --sl-input-focus-ring-offset: 0;

  --sl-input-filled-background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-100);
  --sl-input-filled-background-color-hover: var(--sl-color-neutral-100);
  --sl-input-filled-background-color-focus: var(--sl-color-neutral-100);
  --sl-input-filled-background-color-disabled: var(--sl-color-neutral-100);
  --sl-input-filled-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-800);
  --sl-input-filled-color-hover: var(--sl-color-neutral-800);
  --sl-input-filled-color-focus: var(--sl-color-neutral-700);
  --sl-input-filled-color-disabled: var(--sl-color-neutral-800);

  --sl-input-label-font-size-small: var(--sl-font-size-small);
  --sl-input-label-font-size-medium: var(--sl-font-size-medium);
  --sl-input-label-font-size-large: var(--sl-font-size-large);
  --sl-input-label-color: inherit;

  --sl-input-help-text-font-size-small: var(--sl-font-size-x-small);
  --sl-input-help-text-font-size-medium: var(--sl-font-size-small);
  --sl-input-help-text-font-size-large: var(--sl-font-size-medium);
  --sl-input-help-text-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-500);

  --sl-toggle-size-small: 0.875rem;
  --sl-toggle-size-medium: 1.125rem;
  --sl-toggle-size-large: 1.375rem;

  --sl-overlay-background-color: hsl(240 3.8% 46.1% / 33%);

  --sl-panel-background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0);
  --sl-panel-border-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-200);
  --sl-panel-border-width: 1px;

  --sl-tooltip-border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium);
  --sl-tooltip-background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-800);
  --sl-tooltip-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0);
  --sl-tooltip-font-family: var(--sl-font-sans);
  --sl-tooltip-font-weight: var(--sl-font-weight-normal);
  --sl-tooltip-font-size: var(--sl-font-size-small);
  --sl-tooltip-line-height: var(--sl-line-height-dense);
  --sl-tooltip-padding: var(--sl-spacing-2x-small) var(--sl-spacing-x-small);
  --sl-tooltip-arrow-size: 6px;

  --sl-z-index-drawer: 700;
  --sl-z-index-dialog: 800;
  --sl-z-index-dropdown: 900;
  --sl-z-index-toast: 950;
  --sl-z-index-tooltip: 1000;
}

@supports (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock {
    scrollbar-gutter: var(--sl-scroll-lock-gutter) !important;
  }

  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert::part(base) {
  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);
}

sl-radio-group *, sl-radio-group ::before, sl-radio-group ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>.form-control .form-control__label { display: none; }
.form-control .form-control__help-text { display: none; }
.form-control--has-label .form-control__label { display: inline-block; color: var(--sl-input-label-color); margin-bottom: var(--sl-spacing-3x-small); }
.form-control--has-label.form-control--small .form-control__label { font-size: var(--sl-input-label-font-size-small); }
.form-control--has-label.form-control--medium .form-control__label { font-size: var(--sl-input-label-font-size-medium); }
.form-control--has-label.form-control--large .form-control__label { font-size: var(--sl-input-label-font-size-large); }
sl-radio-group([required]) .form-control--has-label .form-control__label::after { content: var(--sl-input-required-content); margin-inline-start: var(--sl-input-required-content-offset); color: var(--sl-input-required-content-color); }
.form-control--has-help-text .form-control__help-text { display: block; color: var(--sl-input-help-text-color); margin-top: var(--sl-spacing-3x-small); }
.form-control--has-help-text.form-control--small .form-control__help-text { font-size: var(--sl-input-help-text-font-size-small); }
.form-control--has-help-text.form-control--medium .form-control__help-text { font-size: var(--sl-input-help-text-font-size-medium); }
.form-control--has-help-text.form-control--large .form-control__help-text { font-size: var(--sl-input-help-text-font-size-large); }
.form-control--has-help-text.form-control--radio-group .form-control__help-text { margin-top: var(--sl-spacing-2x-small); }</style>
<style>sl-radio-group { display: block; }
.form-control { position: relative; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; padding: 0px; margin: 0px; }
.form-control__label { padding: 0px; }
.radio-group--required .radio-group__label::after { content: var(--sl-input-required-content); margin-inline-start: var(--sl-input-required-content-offset); }
.visually-hidden { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0px; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0px, 0px, 0px, 0px); white-space: nowrap; border: 0px; }</style>

attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
The radio group's label. Required for proper accessibility. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot
instead.

attributes.name: help-text
attributes.description: The radio groups's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the `help-text` slot instead.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the radio group, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The current value of the radio group, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The radio group's size. This size will be applied to all child radios and radio buttons.

attributes.name: form
attributes.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element. This attribute allows you
to place the form control outside of a form and associate it with the form that has this `id`. The form must be in
the same document or shadow root for this to work.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Ensures a child radio is checked before allowing the containing form to submit.

events.name: sl-change
events.description: Emitted when the radio group's selected value changes.

events.name: sl-input
events.description: Emitted when the radio group receives user input.

events.name: sl-invalid
events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.

slots.description: The default slot where `<sl-radio>` or `<sl-radio-button>` elements are placed.

slots.name: label
slots.description: The radio group's label. Required for proper accessibility. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.

slots.name: help-text
slots.description: Text that describes how to use the radio group. Alternatively, you can use the `help-text` attribute.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the range, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The current value of the range, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The range's label. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.

attributes.name: help-text
attributes.description: The range's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the help-text slot instead.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the range.

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: The minimum acceptable value of the range.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: The maximum acceptable value of the range.

attributes.name: step
attributes.description: The interval at which the range will increase and decrease.

attributes.name: tooltip
attributes.description: The preferred placement of the range's tooltip.

attributes.name: form
attributes.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element. This attribute allows you
to place the form control outside of a form and associate it with the form that has this `id`. The form must be in
the same document or shadow root for this to work.

events.name: sl-blur
events.description: Emitted when the control loses focus.

events.name: sl-change
events.description: Emitted when an alteration to the control's value is committed by the user.

events.name: sl-focus
events.description: Emitted when the control gains focus.

events.name: sl-input
events.description: Emitted when the control receives input.

events.name: sl-invalid
events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.

slots.name: label
slots.description: The range's label. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.

slots.name: help-text
slots.description: Text that describes how to use the input. Alternatively, you can use the `help-text` attribute.
