  --sl-panel-border-width: 1px;

  --sl-tooltip-border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium);
  --sl-tooltip-background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-800);
  --sl-tooltip-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0);
  --sl-tooltip-font-family: var(--sl-font-sans);
  --sl-tooltip-font-weight: var(--sl-font-weight-normal);
  --sl-tooltip-font-size: var(--sl-font-size-small);
  --sl-tooltip-line-height: var(--sl-line-height-dense);
  --sl-tooltip-padding: var(--sl-spacing-2x-small) var(--sl-spacing-x-small);
  --sl-tooltip-arrow-size: 6px;

  --sl-z-index-drawer: 700;
  --sl-z-index-dialog: 800;
  --sl-z-index-dropdown: 900;
  --sl-z-index-toast: 950;
  --sl-z-index-tooltip: 1000;
}

@supports (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock {
    scrollbar-gutter: var(--sl-scroll-lock-gutter) !important;
  }

  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert::part(base) {
  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);
}
</style><sl-rating value="3"><style>sl-rating { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-rating *, sl-rating ::before, sl-rating ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-rating { --symbol-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-300); --symbol-color-active: var(--sl-color-amber-500); --symbol-size: 1.2rem; --symbol-spacing: var(--sl-spacing-3x-small); display: inline-flex; }
.rating { position: relative; display: inline-flex; border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium); vertical-align: middle; }
.rating:focus { outline: none; }
.rating:focus-visible { outline: var(--sl-focus-ring); outline-offset: var(--sl-focus-ring-offset); }
.rating__symbols { display: inline-flex; position: relative; font-size: var(--symbol-size); line-height: 0; color: var(--symbol-color); white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; }
.rating__symbols > * { padding: var(--symbol-spacing); }
.rating__symbol--active, .rating__partial--filled { color: var(--symbol-color-active); }
.rating__partial-symbol-container { position: relative; }
.rating__partial--filled { position: absolute; top: var(--symbol-spacing); left: var(--symbol-spacing); }
.rating__symbol { transition: var(--sl-transition-fast) scale; pointer-events: none; }
.rating__symbol--hover { scale: 1.2; }
.rating--disabled .rating__symbols, .rating--readonly .rating__symbols { cursor: default; }
.rating--disabled .rating__symbol--hover, .rating--readonly .rating__symbol--hover { scale: none; }
.rating--disabled { opacity: 0.5; }
.rating--disabled .rating__symbols { cursor: not-allowed; }
@media (forced-colors: active) {
  .rating__symbol--active { color: selecteditem; }
}</style>

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: A label that describes the rating to assistive devices.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The current rating.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: The highest rating to show.

attributes.name: precision
attributes.description:
The precision at which the rating will increase and decrease. For example, to allow half-star ratings, set this
attribute to `0.5`.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Makes the rating readonly.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the rating.

attributes.name: getSymbol
attributes.description:
A function that customizes the symbol to be rendered. The first and only argument is the rating's current value.
The function should return a string containing trusted HTML of the symbol to render at the specified value. Works
well with `<sl-icon>` elements.

events.name: sl-change
events.description: Emitted when the rating's value changes.

events.name: sl-hover
events.description: Emitted when the user hovers over a value. The `phase` property indicates when hovering starts, moves to a new value, or ends. The `value` property tells what the rating's value would be if the user were to commit to the hovered value.

  }

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the select, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The default value of the form control. Primarily used for resetting the form control.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The select's size.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text to show as a hint when the select is empty.

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: Allows more than one option to be selected.

attributes.name: max-options-visible
attributes.description:
The maximum number of selected options to show when `multiple` is true. After the maximum, "+n" will be shown to
indicate the number of additional items that are selected. Set to 0 to remove the limit.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the select control.

attributes.name: clearable
attributes.description: Adds a clear button when the select is not empty.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description:
Indicates whether or not the select is open. You can toggle this attribute to show and hide the menu, or you can
use the `show()` and `hide()` methods and this attribute will reflect the select's open state.

attributes.name: hoist
attributes.description:
Enable this option to prevent the listbox from being clipped when the component is placed inside a container with
`overflow: auto|scroll`. Hoisting uses a fixed positioning strategy that works in many, but not all, scenarios.

attributes.name: filled
attributes.description: Draws a filled select.

attributes.name: pill
attributes.description: Draws a pill-style select with rounded edges.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The select's label. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description:
The preferred placement of the select's menu. Note that the actual placement may vary as needed to keep the listbox
inside of the viewport.

attributes.name: help-text
attributes.description: The select's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the `help-text` slot instead.

attributes.name: form
attributes.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element. This attribute allows you
to place the form control outside of a form and associate it with the form that has this `id`. The form must be in
the same document or shadow root for this to work.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: The select's required attribute.

attributes.name: getTag
attributes.type: (option: SlOption, index: number) => TemplateResult | string | HTMLElement
attributes.description:
A function that customizes the tags to be rendered when multiple=true. The first argument is the option, the second
is the current tag's index.  The function should return either a Lit TemplateResult or a string containing trusted HTML of the symbol to render at
the specified value.

events.name: sl-change
events.description: Emitted when the control's value changes.

events.name: sl-clear
events.description: Emitted when the control's value is cleared.

events.name: sl-input
events.description: Emitted when the control receives input.

events.name: sl-focus
events.description: Emitted when the control gains focus.

events.name: sl-blur
events.description: Emitted when the control loses focus.

events.name: sl-show
events.description: Emitted when the select's menu opens.

events.name: sl-after-show
events.description: Emitted after the select's menu opens and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-hide
events.description: Emitted when the select's menu closes.

events.name: sl-after-hide
events.description: Emitted after the select's menu closes and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-invalid
events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.

slots.description: The listbox options. Must be `<sl-option>` elements. You can use `<sl-divider>` to group items visually.

slots.name: label
slots.description: The input's label. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Used to prepend a presentational icon or similar element to the combobox.

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Used to append a presentational icon or similar element to the combobox.

slots.name: clear-icon
slots.description: An icon to use in lieu of the default clear icon.

slots.name: expand-icon
slots.description: The icon to show when the control is expanded and collapsed. Rotates on open and close.

slots.name: help-text
slots.description: Text that describes how to use the input. Alternatively, you can use the `help-text` attribute.

  --sl-input-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-700);

  --sl-input-focus-ring-offset: 0;

  --sl-z-index-dropdown: 900;
  --sl-z-index-toast: 950;
  --sl-z-index-tooltip: 1000;

@supports (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock {
    scrollbar-gutter: var(--sl-scroll-lock-gutter) !important;
  }

  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert::part(base) {
  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);
}
</style><sl-skeleton effect="pulse"><style>sl-skeleton { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-skeleton *, sl-skeleton ::before, sl-skeleton ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-skeleton { --border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-pill); --color: var(--sl-color-neutral-200); --sheen-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-300); display: block; position: relative; }
.skeleton { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 1rem; }
.skeleton__indicator { flex: 1 1 auto; background: var(--color); border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.skeleton--sheen .skeleton__indicator { background-image: ; background-position-x: ; background-position-y: ; background-repeat: ; background-attachment: ; background-origin: ; background-clip: ; background-color: ; background-size: 400% 100%; animation: 8s ease-in-out 0s infinite normal none running sheen; }
.skeleton--pulse .skeleton__indicator { animation: 2s ease-in-out 0.5s infinite normal none running pulse; }
@media (forced-colors: active) {
  sl-skeleton { --color: GrayText; }
}
@keyframes sheen { 
  0% { background-position: 200% 0px; }
  100% { background-position: -200% 0px; }
}
@keyframes pulse { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  50% { opacity: 0.4; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}</style>
<!---->
      <div part="base" class=" skeleton skeleton--pulse ">
        <div part="indicator" class="skeleton__indicator"></div>
      </div>
    </sl-skeleton></div>

attributes.name: effect
attributes.description: Determines which effect the skeleton will use.

</style><sl-spinner><style>sl-spinner { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-spinner *, sl-spinner ::before, sl-spinner ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-spinner { --track-width: 2px; --track-color: rgb(128 128 128 / 25%); --indicator-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); --speed: 2s; display: inline-flex; width: 1em; height: 1em; flex: 0 0 auto; }
.spinner { flex: 1 1 auto; height: 100%; width: 100%; }
.spinner__track, .spinner__indicator { fill: none; stroke-width: var(--track-width); r: calc(0.5em - var(--track-width) / 2); cx: 0.5em; cy: 0.5em; transform-origin: 50% 50%; }
.spinner__track { stroke: var(--track-color); transform-origin: 0% 0%; }
.spinner__indicator { stroke: var(--indicator-color); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-dasharray: 150%, 75%; animation: spin var(--speed) linear infinite; }
@keyframes spin { 
  0% { transform: rotate(0deg); stroke-dasharray: 0.05em, 3em; }
  50% { transform: rotate(450deg); stroke-dasharray: 1.375em, 1.375em; }
  100% { transform: rotate(1080deg); stroke-dasharray: 0.05em, 3em; }
}</style>

</style><sl-split-panel><style>sl-split-panel { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-split-panel *, sl-split-panel ::before, sl-split-panel ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-split-panel { --divider-width: 4px; --divider-hit-area: 12px; --min: 0%; --max: 100%; display: grid; }
.start, .end { overflow: hidden; }
.divider { flex: 0 0 var(--divider-width); display: flex; position: relative; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-200); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-900); z-index: 1; }
.divider:focus { outline: none; }
sl-split-panel(:not([disabled])) .divider:focus-visible { background-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-0); }
sl-split-panel([disabled]) .divider { cursor: not-allowed; }
sl-split-panel(:not([vertical], [disabled])) .divider { cursor: col-resize; }
sl-split-panel(:not([vertical])) .divider::after { display: flex; content: ""; position: absolute; height: 100%; left: calc(var(--divider-hit-area) / -2 + var(--divider-width) / 2); width: var(--divider-hit-area); }
sl-split-panel([vertical]) { flex-direction: column; }
sl-split-panel([vertical]:not([disabled])) .divider { cursor: row-resize; }
sl-split-panel([vertical]) .divider::after { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 100%; top: calc(var(--divider-hit-area) / -2 + var(--divider-width) / 2); height: var(--divider-hit-area); }
@media (forced-colors: active) {
  .divider { outline: transparent solid 1px; }
}</style>
<!---->
      <slot name="start"></slot>

      <div part="divider" class="divider" role="separator" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100" tabindex="0" aria-valuenow="50" aria-label="Resize">
        <slot name="divider"></slot>
      </div>

      <slot name="end"></slot>
    </sl-split-panel></div>

attributes.name: position
attributes.description:
The current position of the divider from the primary panel's edge as a percentage 0-100. Defaults to 50% of the
container's initial size.

attributes.name: position-in-pixels
attributes.description: The current position of the divider from the primary panel's edge in pixels.

attributes.name: vertical
attributes.description: Draws the split panel in a vertical orientation with the start and end panels stacked.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables resizing. Note that the position may still change as a result of resizing the host element.

attributes.name: primary
attributes.description:
If no primary panel is designated, both panels will resize proportionally when the host element is resized. If a
primary panel is designated, it will maintain its size and the other panel will grow or shrink as needed when the
host element is resized.

attributes.name: snap
attributes.description:
Either one or more space-separated values at which the divider should snap, in pixels, percentages, or repeat expressions e.g. `'100px 50% 500px' or `repeat(50%) 10px`,
or a function which takes in a `SnapFunctionParams`, and returns a position to snap to, e.g. `({ pos }) => Math.round(pos / 8) * 8`.

attributes.name: snap-threshold
attributes.description: How close the divider must be to a snap point until snapping occurs.

events.name: sl-reposition
events.description: Emitted when the divider's position changes.

slots.name: start
slots.description: Content to place in the start panel.

slots.name: end
slots.description: Content to place in the end panel.

slots.name: divider
slots.description: The divider. Useful for slotting in a custom icon that renders as a handle.

@supports (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock {
    scrollbar-gutter: var(--sl-scroll-lock-gutter) !important;
  }

  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert::part(base) {
  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);
}

      <div class=" form-control form-control--medium ">
        <label part="base" class=" switch switch--checked switch--medium ">
          <input class="switch__input" type="checkbox" role="switch" aria-describedby="help-text" title="" name="" aria-checked="true">

          <span part="control" class="switch__control">
            <span part="thumb" class="switch__thumb"></span>
          </span>

          <div part="label" class="switch__label">
            <slot></slot>
          </div>
        </label>

        <div class="form-control__help-text" id="help-text" part="form-control-help-text" aria-hidden="true">
          <slot name="help-text"><!--?lit$495149039$--></slot>
        </div>
      </div>
    </sl-switch></div>

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the switch, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The current value of the switch, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The switch's size.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the switch.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Draws the switch in a checked state.

attributes.name: form
attributes.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element. This attribute allows you
to place the form control outside of a form and associate it with the form that has this `id`. The form must be in
the same document or shadow root for this to work.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Makes the switch a required field.

attributes.name: help-text
attributes.description: The switch's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the `help-text` slot instead.

events.name: sl-blur
events.description: Emitted when the control loses focus.

events.name: sl-change
events.description: Emitted when the control's checked state changes.

events.name: sl-input
events.description: Emitted when the control receives input.

events.name: sl-focus
events.description: Emitted when the control gains focus.

events.name: sl-invalid
events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.

slots.description: The switch's label.

slots.name: help-text
slots.description: Text that describes how to use the switch. Alternatively, you can use the `help-text` attribute.

sl-tab *, sl-tab ::before, sl-tab ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-tab { display: inline-block; }
.tab { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: var(--sl-font-sans); font-size: var(--sl-font-size-small); font-weight: var(--sl-font-weight-semibold); border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-medium); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-600); padding: var(--sl-spacing-medium) var(--sl-spacing-large); white-space: nowrap; user-select: none; cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-speed) box-shadow,
      var(--transition-speed) color; }
.tab:hover:not(.tab--disabled) { color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); }
sl-tab(:focus) { outline: transparent; }
sl-tab(:focus-visible) { color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); outline: var(--sl-focus-ring); outline-offset: calc(-1 * var(--sl-focus-ring-width) - var(--sl-focus-ring-offset)); }
.tab.tab--active:not(.tab--disabled) { color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); }
.tab.tab--closable { padding-inline-end: var(--sl-spacing-small); }
.tab.tab--disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
.tab__close-button { font-size: var(--sl-font-size-small); margin-inline-start: var(--sl-spacing-small); }
.tab__close-button::part(base) { padding: var(--sl-spacing-3x-small); }
@media (forced-colors: active) {
  .tab.tab--active:not(.tab--disabled) { outline: transparent solid 1px; outline-offset: -3px; }
}</style>

attributes.name: panel
attributes.description: The name of the tab panel this tab is associated with. The panel must be located in the same tab group.

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Draws the tab in an active state.

attributes.name: closable
attributes.description: Makes the tab closable and shows a close button.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the tab and prevents selection.

events.name: sl-close
events.description: Emitted when the tab is closable and the close button is activated.

slots.description: The tab's label.

<style>sl-tab-group { --indicator-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); --track-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-200); --track-width: 2px; display: block; }
.tab-group { display: flex; border-radius: 0px; }
.tab-group__tabs { display: flex; position: relative; }
.tab-group__indicator { position: absolute; transition: var(--sl-transition-fast) translate ease,
      var(--sl-transition-fast) width ease; }
.tab-group--has-scroll-controls .tab-group__nav-container { position: relative; padding: 0 var(--sl-spacing-x-large); }
.tab-group--has-scroll-controls .tab-group__scroll-button--start--hidden, .tab-group--has-scroll-controls .tab-group__scroll-button--end--hidden { visibility: hidden; }
.tab-group__body { display: block; overflow: auto; }
.tab-group__scroll-button { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: absolute; top: 0px; bottom: 0px; width: var(--sl-spacing-x-large); }
.tab-group__scroll-button--start { left: 0px; }
.tab-group__scroll-button--end { right: 0px; }
.tab-group--rtl .tab-group__scroll-button--start { left: auto; right: 0px; }
.tab-group--rtl .tab-group__scroll-button--end { left: 0px; right: auto; }
.tab-group--top { flex-direction: column; }
.tab-group--top .tab-group__nav-container { order: 1; }
.tab-group--top .tab-group__nav { display: flex; overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none; }
.tab-group--top .tab-group__nav::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 0px; height: 0px; }
.tab-group--top .tab-group__tabs { flex: 1 1 auto; position: relative; flex-direction: row; border-bottom: solid var(--track-width) var(--track-color); }
.tab-group--top .tab-group__indicator { bottom: calc(-1 * var(--track-width)); border-bottom: solid var(--track-width) var(--indicator-color); }
.tab-group--top .tab-group__body { order: 2; }
.tab-group--top ::slotted(sl-tab-panel) { --padding: var(--sl-spacing-medium) 0; }
.tab-group--bottom { flex-direction: column; }
.tab-group--bottom .tab-group__nav-container { order: 2; }
.tab-group--bottom .tab-group__nav { display: flex; overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none; }
.tab-group--bottom .tab-group__nav::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 0px; height: 0px; }
.tab-group--bottom .tab-group__tabs { flex: 1 1 auto; position: relative; flex-direction: row; border-top: solid var(--track-width) var(--track-color); }
.tab-group--bottom .tab-group__indicator { top: calc(-1 * var(--track-width)); border-top: solid var(--track-width) var(--indicator-color); }
.tab-group--bottom .tab-group__body { order: 1; }
.tab-group--bottom ::slotted(sl-tab-panel) { --padding: var(--sl-spacing-medium) 0; }
.tab-group--start { flex-direction: row; }
.tab-group--start .tab-group__nav-container { order: 1; }
.tab-group--start .tab-group__tabs { flex: 0 0 auto; flex-direction: column; border-inline-end: solid var(--track-width) var(--track-color); }
.tab-group--start .tab-group__indicator { right: calc(-1 * var(--track-width)); border-right: solid var(--track-width) var(--indicator-color); }
.tab-group--start.tab-group--rtl .tab-group__indicator { right: auto; left: calc(-1 * var(--track-width)); }
.tab-group--start .tab-group__body { flex: 1 1 auto; order: 2; }
.tab-group--start ::slotted(sl-tab-panel) { --padding: 0 var(--sl-spacing-medium); }
.tab-group--end { flex-direction: row; }
.tab-group--end .tab-group__nav-container { order: 2; }
.tab-group--end .tab-group__tabs { flex: 0 0 auto; flex-direction: column; border-left: solid var(--track-width) var(--track-color); }
.tab-group--end .tab-group__indicator { left: calc(-1 * var(--track-width)); border-inline-start: solid var(--track-width) var(--indicator-color); }
.tab-group--end.tab-group--rtl .tab-group__indicator { right: calc(-1 * var(--track-width)); left: auto; }
.tab-group--end .tab-group__body { flex: 1 1 auto; order: 1; }
.tab-group--end ::slotted(sl-tab-panel) { --padding: 0 var(--sl-spacing-medium); }</style>

            <div part="tabs" class="tab-group__tabs" role="tablist">
              <div part="active-tab-indicator" class="tab-group__indicator" style="display: block; width: 75px; height: auto; translate: 0px;"></div>
              <sl-resize-observer>
                <slot name="nav"><sl-tab slot="nav" panel="a" role="tab" aria-disabled="false" aria-selected="true" id="sl-tab-1" tabindex="0" aria-controls="sl-tab-panel-1" active="">Tab A</sl-tab> <sl-tab slot="nav" panel="b" role="tab" aria-disabled="false" aria-selected="false" id="sl-tab-2" tabindex="-1" aria-controls="sl-tab-panel-2">Tab B</sl-tab></slot>
              </sl-resize-observer>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!--?lit$653781945$-->
        </div>

        <slot><sl-tab-panel name="a" id="sl-tab-panel-1" role="tabpanel" aria-hidden="false" aria-labelledby="sl-tab-1" active="">Panel A</sl-tab-panel> <sl-tab-panel name="b" id="sl-tab-panel-2" role="tabpanel" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="sl-tab-2">Panel B</sl-tab-panel></slot>
      </div>
    </sl-tab-group></div>

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: The placement of the tabs.

attributes.name: activation
attributes.description:
When set to auto, navigating tabs with the arrow keys will instantly show the corresponding tab panel. When set to
manual, the tab will receive focus but will not show until the user presses spacebar or enter.

attributes.name: no-scroll-controls
attributes.description: Disables the scroll arrows that appear when tabs overflow.

attributes.name: fixed-scroll-controls
attributes.description: Prevent scroll buttons from being hidden when inactive.

events.name: sl-tab-show
events.description: Emitted when a tab is shown.

events.name: sl-tab-hide
events.description: Emitted when a tab is hidden.

slots.description: Used for grouping tab panels in the tab group. Must be `<sl-tab-panel>` elements.

slots.name: nav
slots.description: Used for grouping tabs in the tab group. Must be `<sl-tab>` elements.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The tab panel's name.

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: When true, the tab panel will be shown.

slots.description: The tab panel's content.

sl-tag *, sl-tag ::before, sl-tag ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-tag { display: inline-block; }
.tag { display: flex; align-items: center; border: 1px solid; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; user-select: none; }
.tag__remove::part(base) { color: inherit; padding: 0px; }
.tag--primary { background-color: var(--sl-color-primary-50); border-color: var(--sl-color-primary-200); color: var(--sl-color-primary-800); }
.tag--primary:active > sl-icon-button { color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); }
.tag--success { background-color: var(--sl-color-success-50); border-color: var(--sl-color-success-200); color: var(--sl-color-success-800); }
.tag--success:active > sl-icon-button { color: var(--sl-color-success-600); }
.tag--neutral { background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-50); border-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-200); color: var(--sl-color-neutral-800); }
.tag--neutral:active > sl-icon-button { color: var(--sl-color-neutral-600); }
.tag--warning { background-color: var(--sl-color-warning-50); border-color: var(--sl-color-warning-200); color: var(--sl-color-warning-800); }
.tag--warning:active > sl-icon-button { color: var(--sl-color-warning-600); }
.tag--danger { background-color: var(--sl-color-danger-50); border-color: var(--sl-color-danger-200); color: var(--sl-color-danger-800); }
.tag--danger:active > sl-icon-button { color: var(--sl-color-danger-600); }
.tag--small { font-size: var(--sl-button-font-size-small); height: calc(var(--sl-input-height-small) * 0.8); line-height: calc(var(--sl-input-height-small) - var(--sl-input-border-width) * 2); border-radius: var(--sl-input-border-radius-small); padding: 0 var(--sl-spacing-x-small); }
.tag--medium { font-size: var(--sl-button-font-size-medium); height: calc(var(--sl-input-height-medium) * 0.8); line-height: calc(var(--sl-input-height-medium) - var(--sl-input-border-width) * 2); border-radius: var(--sl-input-border-radius-medium); padding: 0 var(--sl-spacing-small); }
.tag--large { font-size: var(--sl-button-font-size-large); height: calc(var(--sl-input-height-large) * 0.8); line-height: calc(var(--sl-input-height-large) - var(--sl-input-border-width) * 2); border-radius: var(--sl-input-border-radius-large); padding: 0 var(--sl-spacing-medium); }
.tag__remove { margin-inline-start: var(--sl-spacing-x-small); }
.tag--pill { border-radius: var(--sl-border-radius-pill); }</style>

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the textarea, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The current value of the textarea, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The textarea's size.

attributes.name: filled
attributes.description: Draws a filled textarea.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The textarea's label. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.

attributes.name: help-text
attributes.description: The textarea's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the `help-text` slot instead.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text to show as a hint when the input is empty.

attributes.name: rows
attributes.description: The number of rows to display by default.

attributes.name: resize
attributes.description: Controls how the textarea can be resized.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the textarea.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Makes the textarea readonly.

attributes.name: form
attributes.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element. This attribute allows you
to place the form control outside of a form and associate it with the form that has this `id`. The form must be in
the same document or shadow root for this to work.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Makes the textarea a required field.

attributes.name: minlength
attributes.description: The minimum length of input that will be considered valid.

attributes.name: maxlength
attributes.description: The maximum length of input that will be considered valid.

attributes.name: autocapitalize
attributes.description: Controls whether and how text input is automatically capitalized as it is entered by the user.

attributes.name: autocorrect
attributes.description: Indicates whether the browser's autocorrect feature is on or off.

attributes.name: autocomplete
attributes.description:
Specifies what permission the browser has to provide assistance in filling out form field values. Refer to
[this page on MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/autocomplete) for available values.

attributes.name: autofocus
attributes.description: Indicates that the input should receive focus on page load.

attributes.name: enterkeyhint
attributes.description: Used to customize the label or icon of the Enter key on virtual keyboards.

attributes.name: spellcheck
attributes.description: Enables spell checking on the textarea.

attributes.name: inputmode
attributes.description:
Tells the browser what type of data will be entered by the user, allowing it to display the appropriate virtual
keyboard on supportive devices.

events.name: sl-blur
events.description: Emitted when the control loses focus.

events.name: sl-change
events.description: Emitted when an alteration to the control's value is committed by the user.

events.name: sl-focus
events.description: Emitted when the control gains focus.

events.name: sl-input
events.description: Emitted when the control receives input.

events.name: sl-invalid
events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.

slots.name: label
slots.description: The textarea's label. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.

slots.name: help-text
slots.description: Text that describes how to use the input. Alternatively, you can use the `help-text` attribute.

@supports (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {

  .sl-scroll-lock body {

  }
}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);
}

<style>sl-tooltip { --max-width: 20rem; --hide-delay: 0ms; --show-delay: 150ms; display: contents; }
.tooltip { --arrow-size: var(--sl-tooltip-arrow-size); --arrow-color: var(--sl-tooltip-background-color); }
.tooltip::part(popup) { z-index: var(--sl-z-index-tooltip); }
.tooltip[placement^="top"]::part(popup) { transform-origin: center bottom; }
.tooltip[placement^="bottom"]::part(popup) { transform-origin: center top; }
.tooltip[placement^="left"]::part(popup) { transform-origin: right center; }
.tooltip[placement^="right"]::part(popup) { transform-origin: left center; }
.tooltip__body { display: block; width: max-content; max-width: var(--max-width); border-radius: var(--sl-tooltip-border-radius); background-color: var(--sl-tooltip-background-color); font-family: var(--sl-tooltip-font-family); font-size: var(--sl-tooltip-font-size); font-weight: var(--sl-tooltip-font-weight); line-height: var(--sl-tooltip-line-height); text-align: start; white-space: normal; color: var(--sl-tooltip-color); padding: var(--sl-tooltip-padding); pointer-events: none; user-select: none; }</style>

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: The tooltip's content. If you need to display HTML, use the `content` slot instead.

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description:
The preferred placement of the tooltip. Note that the actual placement may vary as needed to keep the tooltip
inside of the viewport.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the tooltip so it won't show when triggered.

attributes.name: distance
attributes.description: The distance in pixels from which to offset the tooltip away from its target.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Indicates whether or not the tooltip is open. You can use this in lieu of the show/hide methods.

attributes.name: skidding
attributes.description: The distance in pixels from which to offset the tooltip along its target.

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description:
Controls how the tooltip is activated. Possible options include `click`, `hover`, `focus`, and `manual`. Multiple
options can be passed by separating them with a space. When manual is used, the tooltip must be activated
programmatically.

attributes.name: hoist
attributes.description:
Enable this option to prevent the tooltip from being clipped when the component is placed inside a container with
`overflow: auto|hidden|scroll`. Hoisting uses a fixed positioning strategy that works in many, but not all,
scenarios.

events.name: sl-show
events.description: Emitted when the tooltip begins to show.

events.name: sl-after-show
events.description: Emitted after the tooltip has shown and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-hide
events.description: Emitted when the tooltip begins to hide.

events.name: sl-after-hide
events.description: Emitted after the tooltip has hidden and all animations are complete.

slots.description: The tooltip's target element. Avoid slotting in more than one element, as subsequent ones will be ignored.

slots.name: content
slots.description: The content to render in the tooltip. Alternatively, you can use the `content` attribute.

    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock body {
    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);

</style><sl-tree><sl-tree-item expanded>Branch<sl-tree-item>Leaf</sl-tree-item></sl-tree-item><style>sl-tree { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-tree *, sl-tree ::before, sl-tree ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-tree { --indent-guide-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-200); --indent-guide-offset: 0; --indent-guide-style: solid; --indent-guide-width: 0; --indent-size: var(--sl-spacing-large); display: block; font-size: 0px; }</style>
<!---->
      <div part="base" class="tree">
        <slot><sl-tree-item expanded="" role="treeitem" tabindex="-1" aria-selected="false" aria-disabled="false" aria-expanded="true">Branch<sl-tree-item role="treeitem" tabindex="-1" slot="children" aria-selected="false" aria-disabled="false">Leaf</sl-tree-item></sl-tree-item></slot>
        <span hidden="" aria-hidden="true"><slot name="expand-icon"></slot></span>
        <span hidden="" aria-hidden="true"><slot name="collapse-icon"></slot></span>
      </div>
    </sl-tree></div>

attributes.name: selection
attributes.description:
The selection behavior of the tree. Single selection allows only one node to be selected at a time. Multiple
displays checkboxes and allows more than one node to be selected. Leaf allows only leaf nodes to be selected.

events.name: sl-selection-change
events.description: Emitted when a tree item is selected or deselected.

slots.description: The default slot.

slots.name: expand-icon
slots.description: The icon to show when the tree item is expanded. Works best with `<sl-icon>`.

slots.name: collapse-icon
slots.description: The icon to show when the tree item is collapsed. Works best with `<sl-icon>`.

@supports (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {
  .sl-scroll-lock {

    overflow: hidden !important;

}

@supports not (scrollbar-gutter: stable) {

    padding-right: var(--sl-scroll-lock-size) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

.sl-toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  inset-inline-end: 0;
  z-index: var(--sl-z-index-toast);
  width: 28rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert {
  margin: var(--sl-spacing-medium);
}

.sl-toast-stack sl-alert::part(base) {
  box-shadow: var(--sl-shadow-large);
}
</style><sl-tree-item expanded>Tree Item<style>sl-tree-item { box-sizing: border-box; }
sl-tree-item *, sl-tree-item ::before, sl-tree-item ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }
[hidden] { display: none !important; }</style>
<style>sl-tree-item { display: block; outline: 0px; z-index: 0; }
sl-tree-item(:focus) { outline: none; }
slot:not([name])::slotted(sl-icon) { margin-inline-end: var(--sl-spacing-x-small); }
.tree-item { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: stretch; flex-direction: column; color: var(--sl-color-neutral-700); cursor: pointer; user-select: none; }
.tree-item__checkbox { pointer-events: none; }
.tree-item__expand-button, .tree-item__checkbox, .tree-item__label { font-family: var(--sl-font-sans); font-size: var(--sl-font-size-medium); font-weight: var(--sl-font-weight-normal); line-height: var(--sl-line-height-dense); letter-spacing: var(--sl-letter-spacing-normal); }
.tree-item__checkbox::part(base) { display: flex; align-items: center; }
.tree-item__indentation { display: block; width: 1em; flex-shrink: 0; }
.tree-item__expand-button { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-sizing: content-box; color: var(--sl-color-neutral-500); padding: var(--sl-spacing-x-small); width: 1rem; height: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; cursor: pointer; }
.tree-item__expand-button { transition: var(--sl-transition-medium) rotate ease; }
.tree-item--expanded .tree-item__expand-button { rotate: 90deg; }
.tree-item--expanded.tree-item--rtl .tree-item__expand-button { rotate: -90deg; }
.tree-item--expanded slot[name="expand-icon"], .tree-item:not(.tree-item--expanded) slot[name="collapse-icon"] { display: none; }
.tree-item:not(.tree-item--has-expand-button) .tree-item__expand-icon-slot { display: none; }
.tree-item__expand-button--visible { cursor: pointer; }
.tree-item__item { display: flex; align-items: center; border-inline-start: 3px solid transparent; }
.tree-item--disabled .tree-item__item { opacity: 0.5; outline: none; cursor: not-allowed; }
sl-tree-item(:focus-visible) .tree-item__item { outline: var(--sl-focus-ring); outline-offset: var(--sl-focus-ring-offset); z-index: 2; }
sl-tree-item(:not([aria-disabled="true"])) .tree-item--selected .tree-item__item { background-color: var(--sl-color-neutral-100); border-inline-start-color: var(--sl-color-primary-600); }
sl-tree-item(:not([aria-disabled="true"])) .tree-item__expand-button { color: var(--sl-color-neutral-600); }
.tree-item__label { display: flex; align-items: center; transition: var(--sl-transition-fast) color; }
.tree-item__children { display: block; font-size: calc(1em + var(--indent-size, var(--sl-spacing-medium))); }
.tree-item__children { position: relative; }
.tree-item__children::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: var(--indent-guide-offset); bottom: var(--indent-guide-offset); left: calc(1em - (var(--indent-guide-width) / 2) - 1px); border-inline-end: var(--indent-guide-width) var(--indent-guide-style) var(--indent-guide-color); z-index: 1; }
.tree-item--rtl .tree-item__children::before { left: auto; right: 1em; }
@media (forced-colors: active) {
  sl-tree-item(:not([aria-disabled="true"])) .tree-item--selected .tree-item__item { outline: selecteditem dashed 1px; }
}</style>

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description: Expands the tree item.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Draws the tree item in a selected state.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the tree item.

attributes.name: lazy
attributes.description: Enables lazy loading behavior.

events.name: sl-expand
events.description: Emitted when the tree item expands.

events.name: sl-after-expand
events.description: Emitted after the tree item expands and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-collapse
events.description: Emitted when the tree item collapses.

events.name: sl-after-collapse
events.description: Emitted after the tree item collapses and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-lazy-change
events.description: Emitted when the tree item's lazy state changes.

events.name: sl-lazy-load
events.description: Emitted when a lazy item is selected. Use this event to asynchronously load data and append items to the tree before expanding. After appending new items, remove the `lazy` attribute to remove the loading state and update the tree.

slots.description: The default slot.

slots.name: expand-icon
slots.description: The icon to show when the tree item is expanded.

slots.name: collapse-icon
slots.description: The icon to show when the tree item is collapsed.
